message:
fix: guard against closing rig identity beads on gt done

Polecats dispatched via mol-polecat-work use the rig bead as their hook.
When no work is found and the polecat calls gt done, the rig identity bead
(permanent infrastructure) was being closed. Add a guard checking for the
gt:rig label and skip close, falling through to idle state update.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2678
PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2679
Author: outdoorsea
